page: Amazon Web Services g7.12xlarge is a graphics-intensive server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 48 dedicated physical Intel CPU cores operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is configured with one thread per core, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, translating to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For graphics and parallel computing workloads, it bundles two NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs, delivering a combined 64 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 1900 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 175 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the g7.12xlarge offers a dense allocation of dedicated high-frequency Intel cores, local NVMe storage, and dual professional-grade GPUs on a single instance. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring high-throughput network performance, local high-speed storage, and GPU acceleration, such as graphics-intensive applications, 3D rendering, and machine learning workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services g7.12xlarge is a graphics-intensive server instance running on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical Intel CPU cores on the x86_64 architecture, operating at 3.9 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 192.0 GB of system memory, equivalent to 4.0 GB per core, and is bundled with two NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM. For storage and connectivity, the instance provides a 1900 GB local NVMe SSD and a baseline network bandwidth of 175 Gbps. This resource-dense profile is designed for graphics-intensive applications, 3D rendering, and parallel computing workloads that require dedicated CPU resources, high-speed local storage, and substantial GPU acceleration.

tagline: A graphics-intensive server featuring dual GPUs, dedicated Intel processors, high-speed local NVMe storage, and high-baseline network bandwidth.

Two NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPUs with 64 GB of total VRAM
192.0 GB of system memory and 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
175 Gbps baseline network bandwidth powered by the Nitro hypervisor
Designed for graphics-intensive workloads, 3D rendering, and parallel computing
